title: Fetching multiple problems in a batch
content: Use the 'batchGetProblems' method to retrieve full details for multiple problem IDs simultaneously. This is more efficient than calling 'getProblem' individually. Provide the 'subject' and an array of 'problem_ids'. Note that all problems must belong to the same subject and the batch size is limited to 10 IDs.
examples: Fetch the full content for these math problems: 101, 102, and 103.
Get all details for chemistry problem IDs 500, 501, 502, 503, and 504.
I need the full solutions for these physics problems: 777, 788, 799.
